items.title_en: Four high-yield savings accounts cut their rates. Where you can still earn 4%
items.title_zh: 四个高收益储蓄账户降低了利率。仍然可以赚取 4% 的收入

items.title_en: Strong earthquake strikes off Cuba's northwest coast
items.title_zh: 古巴西北海岸发生强烈地震
items.desc_en: The U.S. Geological Survey reported the earthquake at a 6.1 magnitude, with its epicenter 104 km west-northwest of Mantua, Cuba.
items.desc_zh: 美国地质调查局报告称，此次地震为里氏 6.1 级，震中位于古巴曼图亚西北偏西 104 公里处。

items.title_en: Watch: Southern Lights timelapse filmed from space
items.title_zh: 观看：从太空拍摄的南极光延时摄影
items.desc_en: This occurrence of aurora australis, or Southern Lights, was captured by NASA astronaut Jessica Meir.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局宇航员杰西卡·梅尔捕捉到了这一现象。

items.title_en: Tom Lee's clients are worried SpaceX IPO will mark a market top. He's not

items.desc_en: The Fundstrat managing partner and head of research said that there's enough cash on the sidelines that public markets can absorb the Elon Musk company's debut.

items.title_en: SpaceX top? Major IPOs don't typically flag a bull market peak, history shows

items.desc_zh: 历史数据表明，大型首次公开募股通常不会预示着接下来一年的牛市高峰。

items.title_en: Airlines find the grass isn't always greener with new engines

items.desc_en: Trump had imposed the $100,000 fee in order to restrict the program, arguing that it has undermined U.S. security through the "replacement of American workers."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普征收10万美元费用是为了限制该计划，认为该计划通过“替换美国工人”损害了美国安全。

items.desc_en: Instead of selling AI tools to companies, venture firms are buying legacy companies outright and rebuilding them around AI from the inside.

items.title_zh: 被定罪的 FTX 创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 正式请求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The co-founder of the now defunct FTX crypto exchange is currently serving a 25-year federal prison sentence.
